title: Various Accounts Concerning Uhud
description: According to Ibn Humayd-Salamah-Muhammad b. Ishaq -'Asim b. 'Umar b. Qatadah-Mahmud b. Labid:'98 When the Messenger of God went out to Uhud, IHusayl b. Jabir-who was al-Yaman, the father of Hudhayfah b. al-Yaman -and Thabit b. Waqsh b. Za'ura', who were very old men, were sent up into the strongholds with the women and children. One of them said to 197. Qur. 16.126-8. Al-Tabari has a fuller isnad for this section than IH. 198. IH, 577.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 07
